sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_low_cardinality (id Int32, value LowCardinality(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_low_cardinality (id, value) VALUES (1, toLowCardinality('example1'));
INSERT INTO test_low_cardinality (id, value) VALUES (2, toLowCardinality('example2'));
SELECT id, value FROM test_low_cardinality WHERE value = toLowCardinality('example1');
UPDATE test_low_cardinality SET value = toLowCardinality('updated_example') WHERE id = 1;
